## LAB REPORT

MRI Lumbar Spine Investigation

## PRECISION DIAGNOSTICS

NABL Accredited Diagnostic Laboratory Hyderabad

| Report ID        | MRI-2026-10218   |
|------------------|------------------|
| Patient Name     | Suresh Patil     |
| Referring Doctor | Dr. Venkat Rao   |
| Test Date        | 20-Jun-2026      |
| Test Name        | MRI Lumbar Spine |

## Findings

- Mild posterior disc bulge at L4-L5 level.
- No evidence of fracture.
- Mild nerve root compression noted.

## Impression

Lumbar Disc Herniation (L4-L5)

## Document Type: LAB REPORT
